name: @envo/cli

scripts.build:bin:all: bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/envo-darwin-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/envo-linux-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/envo-linux-x64

description: The envo CLI — portable, encrypted agent environments
